name: Tart and Tangy Beef on a Bun
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ground beef and onions in a large skillet. Cook over medium heat, breaking up the chunks with a wooden spoon until the meat is browned.
2. Drain off any excess fat from the beef mixture.
3. In a small mixing bowl, stir together the ketchup, packed brown sugar, apple cider vinegar, Worcestershire sauce, Dijon mustard, and honey (if using) until well combined.
4. Stir the sauce mixture into the meat and onions.
5. Bring the mixture to a simmer.
6. Serve on hamburger buns.
Serves 6
